# list_project_subscriptions query

## 001_select_subscriptions.sql

### SQLの概要

Projectが利用可能なAPI一覧を返すため、承認済みsubscriptionを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_api_subscriptions`
- `projects`
- `apis`
- `api_gateway_stages`
- `api_cognito_scopes`
- `project_cognito_client_scopes`
- `project_cognito_clients`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `actor_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `app_client_id` | `str` | no |
| `is_hub_admin` | `Any` | no |
| `after_approved_at` | `Any` | no |
| `limit` | `Any` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `subscription_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `approved_auth_mode` | `str` | no |
| `approved_at` | `datetime` | no |
| `api_code` | `str` | no |
| `api_name` | `str` | no |
| `stage_name` | `str` | no |
| `invoke_url` | `str` | no |
| `scope_full_name` | `str` | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON p.project_id = sub.project_id`
- `JOIN ON a.api_id = sub.api_id`
- `JOIN ON s.api_stage_id = sub.api_stage_id`
- `JOIN ON api_scope.api_id = sub.api_id`
- `JOIN ON granted_scope.subscription_id = sub.subscription_id`
- `JOIN ON app_client.project_cognito_client_id = granted_scope.project_cognito_client_id`
- `JOIN ON pm.project_id = p.project_id AND pm.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE sub.project_id = @project_id AND (p.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR NOT pm.project_member_id IS NULL OR app_client.app_client_id = @app_client_id OR @is_hub_admin = TRUE) AND (@after_approved_at IS NULL OR sub.approved_at < @after_approved_at)`
